name: Unstained Chronicle
acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: Ship of the Dark Sea

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After using Posse, recover HP equal to 12% of the wielder's CON, increasing with the percentage of lost HP, up to 24% of the wielder's CON.

lore: A gaze cast from the heart of eternity. Incorruptible, untainted, and absolute.
